decision: Use release 2.23 as the sole sequential successor of 2.22; release identifiers use one point and release branches are prohibited.
reason: The operator clarified the release-line policy. The former patch-style identifier is not part of the accepted lineage; canonical v2.22 formulations remain unchanged.

decision: Publish one passive-data ZIP with only PDF, JSON and TSV files.
reason: Requested transport boundary and prohibition on executable code.

decision: Treat internal static operability as PASS and external field effectiveness as NOT_CLAIMED.
reason: Internal coherence can be tested here; empirical effectiveness requires independent experience on the target substrate.

decision: Profile derivation nodes reference the exact behavior-profile projection rather than inventing absent PDF destinations.
reason: The canonical PDFs remain byte-identical and contain no named destinations for derived profile records.

decision: T-N-043 remains an inactive publication candidate represented by activation_status CANDIDATE and acceptance_status RECOGNIZED_NOT_ACTIVATED.
reason: CANDIDATE is the canonical v2.22 status; it must not be silently rewritten to ACTIVE or to a noncanonical status.
